rotate_90_clockwise_result_label: Which labeled option shows the Reference icon after a 90 degree clockwise rotation?

Find the labeled option that shows the Reference icon after rotating it 90 degrees clockwise.
What option letter is the 90 degree clockwise rotation of the Reference icon?
Select the option that matches a 90 degree clockwise rotation of the Reference icon.
rotate_90_counterclockwise_result_label: Which labeled option shows the Reference icon after a 90 degree counterclockwise rotation?

What option letter would produce the Reference icon after a 90 degree clockwise rotation?
Select the option that would become the Reference icon after a 90 degree clockwise rotation.

scene:single_transform_options_transform.object_description: a Reference icon with a transform cue and six labeled option icons

scene:single_transform_options_inverse_t.object_description: a transformed Reference icon with a transform cue and four labeled source-option icons

global.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON object with keys "reference_icon" and "selected_option", each a [x0, y0, x1, y1] box in image pixel coordinates
global.answer_hint: set "answer" to the selected option letter
